series_metadata.series_title: Taxpayer Bill of Rights Representative Form
series_metadata.series_description: Departmental form for designating representative to act on behalf of taxpayer.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: After Scanned - 1 month ; Electronic: End of the year following the year in which it expires - Example - TBOR expires March 31, 2005, destruction would occur December 31, 2006., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Erase
